brief_summary: [DONE] Update v2/home/case-studies paths. I dug into the pre‑commit hook and the scripts it calls. There is **no `git clean`, `rm`, `git checkout`, or `git restore`** in `.githooks/pre-commit`, so the hook isn’t deleting untracked files. That means your `todo.txt` deletion did...
